demo_timestamps.description: Introduction to data pipeline from APS to Microsoft Fabric and Co-Pilot
Example of coordination model in Autodesk format shown in 3D
Executing data pipeline in Microsoft Fabric with authentication and medallion structure
Allocating product codes with a custom dashboard for durability analysis
Running calculations for environmental cost with SQL database
Displaying results in a dashboard showing environmental impact of design decisions
Using MCP server in Microsoft Fabric for querying data with Co-Pilot

themes: Automating sustainability metrics in construction using APS and Microsoft technologies

client_mentions.name: Heimungst
client_mentions.context: Data engineer working on building data pipelines

ai_technologies.name: Co-Pilot
ai_technologies.context: Used in querying data with MCP server for environmental cost impact

summary: The video discusses the automation of sustainability metrics in construction projects using Autodesk's APS, Microsoft Fabric, and Co-Pilot technologies. It showcases a data pipeline that integrates these systems to provide real-time environmental cost analyses of unique assemblies. The demonstration highlights how these tools can enhance design decision-making early in infrastructure projects.
